brief_html: Response to a clan remove member request.
remarks_html:
Response to a clan remove member request.

Status is one of the Clan Message Codes:

  • 0x00: Successfully removed member
  • 0x01: Removal failed
  • 0x02: Too soon because the target user has not been a member long enough (must be one week old)
  • 0x07: Not authorized because you are not the leader or an officer
  • 0x08: Not allowed because the target's rank is not lower than yours
